_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: AFFIX-BATCH-2 (2026-07-14): added the 'Trophies of the Arena' loot batch to js/stats.js — 4 gladiatorial prefixes (Gladiatorial, Bloodthirsty, Undaunted, Ironbound) + 4 arena-honour suffixes (of the Arena, of Conquest, of the Champion, of the Bulwark), themed to the hero's own prowess (distinct from Spoils' enemy-family theme). Auto-reachable: makeItem draws rng across the full prefixes/suffixes arrays, so pushing onto pre/suf is the only wiring; affixes never render as map tiles (scene.js/hero.js untouched, zero symbol-crash risk). MAJOR BALANCE FINDING that REVISES the old carried-forward gotcha: the 'keep loot offense/HP-first, zero armor/defense' heuristic is STALE post-rebalance and NO LONGER neutral. Two different PURE-OFFENSE drafts BOTH measured ~1.9pt LOW in a 10k-run isolated A/B (baseline ~38.9% vs batch ~37.0%, z~3.9 pooled) — not noise. An equipped-gear probe explained it: with the win rate now boss-attrition-bound (~72% of losses) and armor being %-mitigation that compounds hardest at depth, the loot pool sits near an offense/defense SWEET SPOT. Pure-offense affixes out-gScore the hero's defensive items and STRIP ~4 pts of armor+defense off its boss-fight gear (str/crit +5-6 each but armor -1.5 / defense -2.6), turning it glass-cannon and costing the ~1.9pt. FIX = composition-match the pool's own budget mix (~61% offense / ~24% hp / ~15% armor+defense): the batch stays offense/HP-LED (6 of 8 affixes) but two defensive gladiator archetypes (Ironbound [1,0,0,1,0,0,2,3], of the Bulwark [0,0,0,3,0,0,1,3]) carry the ~15% armor/def share so it adds 'more of the same' and doesn't shift what the hero equips. RESULT: balance-NEUTRAL — fresh isolated 10k A/B baseline 37.76% vs batch 38.50% (+0.74pt, within noise; batch == the pooled 3x10k baseline mean of 38.50%), and the equipped-gear probe showed armor/defense restored to baseline (24.8/36.0 vs 24.3/34.9). Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` reads 38.5% (2312/6000) — IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms). of the Champion (gScore 10) ties of the Cinderwyrm as the suffix ceiling; luck (idx2) stays 0 (inert). NEW CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHA for loot runs: do NOT ship pure-offense affixes — MATCH the pool's ~15% armor/defense composition, or the win rate drifts ~2pt low (the game is now mitigation-limited, not damage-limited). The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base stays the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
